120363422965145348@g.us.text: Good morning - are there any dressing requirements for the temples?

No, there's no dress code at all. Just wear whatever you're comfortable in. 😊

It's going to be quite hot today, so I highly recommend wearing a hat and bringing some water to stay cool. See you soon!

Ricky, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

-Gilsangsa Temple (special place)

Gilsangsa Temple is a beautiful temple located in Seongbuk-gu, Seoul, where visitors can find peace of mind in a quiet and tranquil atmosphere. Originally a luxurious restaurant, it was transformed into a temple when Kim Young-han, a devoted Buddhist, donated it to the monk Beopjeong. Harmonizing with nature, the temple features scenic walking paths and traditional architecture, offering visitors a place for meditation and relaxation.

What would you like to have for lunch?

In Korea, we have a saying: "Fight heat with heat." During the hot summer, many Koreans enjoy Samgyetang (Korean ginseng chicken soup) because it's considered a nourishing meal that helps restore your energy and keep you healthy.

After visiting Gyeongbokgung Palace, we usually head to a famous Samgyetang restaurant nearby. I highly recommend trying it! It's so well known that it has been featured in the Michelin Guide, and it's one of Seoul's most popular places for this traditional dish.

Ricky, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

Hello! 😊

the bus have already arrived, and I’m here waiting as well.

Please take your time and arrive by 10:00 AM, then simply board the bus when you get here.

One important reminder: Please make sure to bring your passport, as you will need it for today's trip.

See you soon!

Ricky, Guest Care Team of COZE Hospitality 3.0

we also will need airport transportation tomorrow at check out time 11am..
there are 5 adults and 5 kids with all of our luggage/bags..
There are no extra fees. We only charge the actual cost, with no service fee added.😀

Sure, We will book one 7-seater van and one 4-seater van for you. That's two vans in total. 

The total cost is 220,000 won.
TYou're going to Incheon Airport, correct?
yes, we got the toast . thank you.
Then, should I book the two vans for tomorrow 11AM?

I'll turn off the 1st floor remotely. 
It looks like the heater control panel on the wall down there was accidentally pressed and turned on. 

I'll turn it off remotely.

120363426632162671@g.us.text: Hello! My Korean speaking mother will check in by herself. She is not good with technology. Can someone meet her to let her inside the apartment tomorrow and show her how to enter and exit?
She can meet outside the building 3pm or can she call you when she arrives for someone to meet her??

Thank you for letting us know 😊 We’ve noted the requested time of 3:00 PM tomorrow. 

We’ll double-check our schedule and confirm the meeting time with you shortly.
What phone number can she call if she’s lost or delayed?
Could you please also share your mother’s phone number?
Yes. Her name is Young Hee Lee and her number is 010-5577-8959

Would you mind asking your mother if she might be able to visit today instead, at any time that is convenient for her? I’ll be at the unit all day today.
Tomorrow’s schedule is quite busy, so it may be difficult for us to meet her at exactly 3:00 PM. 😊
She is staying far away and can’t come today
Can she check in earlier?
Can I call her?
Yes
Yes.

I tried calling your mother, but her phone was unavailable. Could you please ask her to call me when she has time? Otherwise, I’ll try calling her again later.

Early check-in is available.
Please don’t ask her to come the day before just to learn how to use the keys. She is 80 years old and doesn’t know how to use taxis very well.
What’s your number? I’ll ask her to call you
She is on Kakao if you want to text her
Of course, I completely understand. Please don’t worry—we won’t ask her to make an extra trip today.

Now that we understand your mother is 80 years old, we completely understand that she may need a little extra assistance. 

We’ll make time to meet her at the accommodation tomorrow and help her check in comfortably and safely. 😊
Early check-in is available tomorrow. Please let us know what time your mother will arrive at the accommodation, and we’ll be there to meet her and assist her with check-in. 😊
